displayTitle: Hyperspace Stories Vol 3: Light and Shadows
synopsis:
Hyperspace Stories Vol 3: Light and Shadows
Collecting issues 9 to 12 of the Dark Horse Comics Hyperspace Stories Anthology Series
The Galaxy is a wild and dangerous place!
On the Outer Rim, Jedi like Quinlan Vos, Yoda, and Mace Windu struggle to contain the spreading fires of the Clone Wars, while the clones of the Bad Batch just struggle to make it through the day! And on the forest moon of Endor, the heroes of the Rebellion look back at their greatest triumph.
Secrets will be revealed in this exciting volume of Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories!
Collecting: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories #9-12
title: Hyperspace Stories Vol 3: Light and Shadows
